policy: CORRECTED CS-augmented instruction-only SFT (data_cs_aug2). Fixes the v1 CS-aug regression: (1) CS held to ~9/family = 72 records = 17.6% of the 409 instruction records (was 256 = ~43%); (2) ALL @pure annotations removed from the 306-313 CS-classics templates so the model does not over-apply @pure (no [ANN-001] purity errors). Corpus mix: 72 CS (306-313) + 160 business (301-305) + 166 base + 11 seed instruction pairs. Decontaminated against tasks_cs/tasks_v2_pos/tasks_hard (0 output overlaps; verified two ways: build-time --exclude-benchmark-tasks AND an independent recompile+compare of all 434 records vs 57 benchmark outputs). Built with components/aether/build/aether (2026-06-23-1). 5 business templates and the data_cs_aug v1 dir left untouched.
